sources.snippet: The deal which will pave the way for hostilities to end is close to being finalised, the US, Iran and mediators Pakistan say.
sources.title: Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening, Iran says

sources.snippet: Four activists from Palestine Action jailed by a British court over protest raid on Israeli arms firm in UK.
sources.title: Iran war live: US, Tehran signal peace deal within reach but not signed yet

sources.snippet: Iran's foreign minister Abbas Araghchi said Friday that a draft agreement to end the war with the United States could be signed remotely within days, adding that negotiations had reached their final stages.
sources.title: Middle East live: Iran says US war deal could be signed remotely in 'coming days'

sources.snippet: Analysts say a litany of sticking points have delayed finalizing an accord and will complicate its implementation.
sources.title: Why is a ‘very close’ Iran-U.S. deal taking so long?

sources.snippet: A senior U.S. administration official said both sides had agreed on a text and that Washington expects to sign an initial deal in the coming days.
sources.title: Iran peace deal looms while new military action flares near Strait of Hormuz

sources.snippet: President Trump had previously been amping up his rhetoric against Iran.
sources.title: Trump now says a peace deal will be announced 'soon,' cancels further strikes

sources.snippet: The United States and Iran signaled on Friday that an agreement to end their war was close, with a senior U.S. administration official saying both sides had agreed on a text and that Washington expects to sign an initial deal in the coming days.
sources.title: Iran peace deal looms while new military action flares near Strait of Hormuz

sources.snippet: The United Arab Emirates has agreed to unlock billions of dollars for Iran, four sources said, in a tactical shift after weeks of Iranian attacks on the wealthy Gulf Arab state during the U.S.
sources.title: Exclusive-UAE to unlock billions of dollars for Iran, sources say

sources.snippet: Iran's foreign minister said that while changes in the deal were still possible, the tentative agreement showed his country had emerged stronger from the conflict.
sources.title: Iran peace deal looms while new military action flares near Strait of Hormuz

sources.snippet: The United States and Iran have agreed to wording of an agreement meant to end their war, Pakistan’s prime minister said Friday, just one day before President Donald Trump's birthday.
sources.title: Parties agree on ‘final’ text of a peace deal, Pakistan says

sources.snippet: Trump canceled new Iran strikes and signaled that a peace deal could come soon, but Iran says it hasn't been finalized. And, the U.S. men's soccer team plays its first 2026 World Cup match today.
sources.title: Trump cancels further Iran strikes. And, U.S. men's soccer takes on Paraguay

topic.title: US and Iran finalize peace deal text, Pakistan mediates as Trump cancels further strikes

topic.urgencyReason: Peace deal text agreed, but final signing not yet complete; military clashes continue near Strait of Hormuz.

enriched.summary:
- The United States and Iran have finalized the text of a peace deal, with Pakistan serving as the mediator in the negotiations.
- President Trump has canceled further military strikes against Iran, signaling a shift toward diplomatic resolution.
- The agreement marks a significant de-escalation following heightened tensions and potential military confrontation.
- **Main countries/regions involved:** United States, Iran, Pakistan.
